data.description: UK House of Commons votes against launching an investigation into Prime Minister Keir Starmer over allegations he misled MPs is just getting under way in the House of Commons
UK lawmakers vote against holding an inquiry into whether PM Starmer misled parliament over Mandelson appointment.

data.title: Constellation Energy Corporation Declares Dividend
data.description: In Baltimore, the Board of Directors of Constellation Energy Corporation (Nasdaq: CEG) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.4265 per share on Constellation’s common stock. Shareholders of record by May 15, 2026, at 5 p.m. Eastern time, will receive the dividend on June 5, 2026. Constellation Energy Corporation (Nasdaq: CEG), a Fortune 200 company based in Baltimore, is the world's leading private-sector power producer and the largest in the nation.

data.title: Nihon Kohden Brings NomadAir® with Connect to Dental Sleep Medicine, Connecting Providers for Faster, Smarter Care
data.description: Nihon Kohden, a renowned provider of neurodiagnostic, patient monitoring, and ventilation solutions, has revealed its decision to widen the availability of NomadAir® with Connect, an established at-home sleep apnea diagnostic system, to encompass dental sleep medicine. This strategic move will be showcased at the American Academy of Dental Sleep Medicine (AADSM) Annual Meeting from May 1-3 in Chicago. By advancing into this new realm, Nihon Kohden aims to tap into the increasing synergy between dental practitioners and sleep specialists. The company's presence at the event can be found at Booth 408.

data.title: Simplify Alpha™ Partners With ServiceNow to Reimagine Health Plan Operations at Scale
data.description: In Aurora, Illinois, Simplify Alpha™, a Solutions-as-a-Service (SolaaS) division of Simplify Group™, has revealed a collaboration with ServiceNow to enhance health plan operations on a large scale. This partnership will utilize the ServiceNow AI Platform, incorporating Healthcare and Life Sciences (HCLS) Management, agentic AI functions, and enterprise workflow orchestration. Simplify Group™ will contribute its extensive payer domain knowledge, developed over engagements with 70+ U.S. health plan organizations.

data.title: Lena Johnson Named President of National Brokerage for Douglas Elliman Realty
data.description: A highly experienced executive from a luxury brand and real estate industry veteran has been appointed to oversee national brokerage operations for Douglas Elliman Realty, a leading luxury residential real estate brokerage. The aim is to further enhance Douglas Elliman's position in the high-end market. The appointment was made in New York on April 28, 2026. This move is geared towards leveraging the individual's expertise to drive growth and consolidate Douglas Elliman's leadership in upscale real estate.

data.title: Rebate Spy Launches as Premium Solar and Battery Provider With Service-First Model in Market Where One in Three Systems Are Orphaned
data.description: Rebate Spy, a solar and battery provider created by Pedro and Luis Estrella, has been launched in Melbourne, Australia on April 28, 2026. They offer a premium service focused on transparency, installation quality, and long-term customer accountability.

data.title: Georgia-Pacific Names Ryan Elwart, Senior Vice President - Sales and Innovation, GP Foodservice Solutions
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Georgia-Pacific revealed the appointment of Ryan Elwart as the senior vice president of sales and innovation for GP Foodservice Solutions, encompassing Dixie® and Anchor Packaging. Elwart will take charge of this new business segment, overseeing the sales strategies and innovations.

data.title: Linkhome Holdings Inc. Signs MOU to Acquire Mortgage One Group, Accelerating Nationwide Expansion of AI Real Estate & Fintech Platform
data.description: Irvine, CA - April 28, 2026 - Linkhome Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: LHAI), an AI-based real estate and fintech platform, revealed its plan to purchase 100% of Mortgage One Group, a comprehensive direct mortgage lender. The Company signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) for this acquisition.
